description: Run-based games with procedural generation and meta-progression
bootstrap_note: Ad-hoc optional (not in canonical registry — requires user opt-in): build-variety-design (build synergy space, viable archetypes, run variance analysis — for roguelikes with deep build expression like Hades/Dead Cells). Canonical optional guidance: card-system-design for deck-building roguelikes (Slay the Spire style); puzzle-design for puzzle-hybrid roguelikes
